acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-FangTian SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The FangTian team is responsible for the development and maintenance of FangTian window engine in openeuler community.. The SIG has 11 core members and maintains 16 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-FangTian SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-FangTian SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at sig-FangTian@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-FangTian SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-FangTian SIG maintains 16 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-FangTian.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-FangTian SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-FangTian SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: 吴圣垚, 郑森文, 冯绍波. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
